payload.evidence: Published a schema-14 ownership-clean baseline with byte/logical hashes and seven incorporated changesets. Tampered snapshots and incorporated JSONL fail atomically; later changesets replay; all durable non-derived tables match the live source; 97 Rust tests and the full pre-merge contract pass.
payload.verify_command: tests/bootstrap/test-core-state-materialization.sh && scripts/verify-core-snapshot.sh && scripts/verify-materialized-core-parity.sh && cargo test -p harness-cli replay_preserves_generated_timestamps --locked && tests/docs/test-doc-contracts.sh && git diff --check

payload.actions_taken: ["Added Bash and PowerShell materializers; added snapshot publisher and verifier; closed the obsolete core-epoch blocker; published the schema-14 baseline and manifest; added tamper","atomicity","parity","installer","and timestamp replay coverage; ran the full pre-merge contract."]
payload.decisions_made: ["Treat changeset_applied as epoch-derived bookkeeping; bind compacted changesets by id/path/content hash; activate only after ownership and integrity checks; preserve generated timestamps in future semantic operations; keep consumer bootstrap unchanged."]
payload.errors: ["Initial durable-table parity failed because legacy story.add and graph-edge replay regenerated created_at; fixed typed operation emission/replay and republished the still-unshared baseline at the clean cut line."]
payload.harness_friction: The first parity comparison exposed replay-time created_at drift for story and graph inserts; the operation log was corrected to carry generated timestamps, and the comparison remained strict.
payload.notes: Local platform proof remains false; the PowerShell materializer contract is checked locally and executes in the existing platform matrix.
payload.task_summary: Published and proved the verified core snapshot and atomic source-state materialization path.
